name: Chia Seeds with Pomegranate
intro: Chia fresca, a popular drink in South America, is made from chia seeds mixed with water, lime juice, and some type of sweetener. I made a fresh, pumped up version of the drink that includes pomegranate seeds and coconut water. Vary the amount of liquid depending on if you want to make a chia drink or a pudding. Sweeten it with honey, if you prefer.
method: Mix the chia seeds and the coconut water, and stir in the pomegranate seeds. Let sit for at least 30 minutes before serving.
